pages.full_text:
86 Westfield Rd, Edgbaston, Birmingham, B153 JG.

[glued-in postcard of Chenonceau — printed text on postcard: CHENONCEAU]
pages.notes: This appears to be the inside front cover. The address '86 Westfield Rd, Edgbaston, Birmingham, B153 JG.' is written in pencil at the top. A postcard of Chateau de Chenonceau is glued in. The partial text 'Va' visible at the right gutter edge is the start of 'Van' continuing on the right page.

pages.full_text:
Birthday present from Peter
June 6th 1989.

__Camping in the van__. May 1989....

.... October 1992

Van Picked up by Jim, Margaret, Helen,
      Simon, Thomas, William, Peter.
pages.notes: Title/dedication page. Main text is in pencil/grey ink. 'October 1992' is written in blue ink and appears to be a later annotation, likely indicating the diary's end date. The underlined heading '__Camping in the van__. May 1989....' spans across the underline. 'Van Picked up by...' lists the family members who used the van. No place names appear in the text on this page.
